tender.description: Renewal by SDBC on following motor roads under Mussoorie Constituency under Annual Repair (i) Dehradun Kimadi Lambidhar Motilal Nehru Cart Mackenzie Hollock Company Garden road (ii) Rajpur to Mussoorie road via Snow View Jharipani Barlowgunj road.
